# iosxe_object_group (Data Source)

This data source can read the Object Group configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "iosxe_object_group" "example" {
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `device` (String) A device name from the provider configuration.

### Read-Only

- `fqdn` (Attributes List) FQDN object-group type (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--fqdn))
- `id` (String) The path of the retrieved object.

<a id="nestedatt--fqdn"></a>
### Nested Schema for `fqdn`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) Description for FQDN OG
- `group_objects` (Attributes Set) List of nested FQDN Groups (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--fqdn--group_objects))
- `name` (String) Name of FQDN OG
- `patterns` (Attributes Set) List of reg exp FQDN patterns (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--fqdn--patterns))

<a id="nestedatt--fqdn--group_objects"></a>
### Nested Schema for `fqdn.group_objects`

Read-Only:

- `group_name` (String) FQDN group name


<a id="nestedatt--fqdn--patterns"></a>
### Nested Schema for `fqdn.patterns`

Read-Only:

- `fqdn_pattern` (String) FQDN pattern
